name: JetBrains AI Assistant
description: Native AI assistant with chat, code completion, refactoring suggestions, commit message generation, and local model support.

name: Junie
description: JetBrains AI coding agent for autonomous multi-step task handling including feature implementation and test writing.

name: GitHub Copilot
description: AI pair programmer offering inline code completion, chat, and agentic modes powered by OpenAI models.

name: Tabnine: AI Code Completion & Chat
description: Privacy-first AI code assistant with context-aware completions, on-premise deployment, and team collaboration features.

name: Amazon Q
description: Amazon's AI coding assistant (formerly CodeWhisperer) with code suggestions, security scanning, and AWS context awareness.

name: Gemini Code Assist
description: Google's Gemini-powered free code completion and chat assistant integrated into JetBrains IDEs.

name: Claude Code
description: Anthropic's Claude AI assistant integration for JetBrains IDEs (requires the Claude Code CLI).

name: Lingma
description: Alibaba Cloud AI coding assistant with code completion and chat powered by Alibaba's models.

name: Full Line Code Completion
description: Local deep-learning model delivering full-line code completions without sharing data externally.

name: LLM by Hugging Face
description: Code completion powered by open-source ML models (StarCoder, CodeLlama) via Hugging Face backends.

name: IdeaVim
description: Adds full Vim modal editing, keybindings, and commands to all JetBrains IDEs.

name: Key Promoter X
description: Shows the keyboard shortcut you should have used whenever you perform a mouse action that has one.

name: AceJump
description: Allows instant caret navigation to any visible position in the editor with a few keystrokes.

name: String Manipulation
description: Tools for sorting, filtering, encoding, case switching, and transforming selected text strings.

name: CodeGlance Pro
description: Adds a zoomed-out code minimap in the editor scrollbar for quick navigation of large files.

name: Rainbow Brackets
description: Colorizes matching pairs of brackets, braces, and parentheses to improve readability of nested code.

name: Indent Rainbow
description: Colors indentation levels with alternating colors to make deeply nested code easier to follow.

name: HighlightBracketPair
description: Highlights the matching bracket pair on cursor hover, including HTML and XML tags.

name: Custom Postfix Templates
description: Lets you define and use your own postfix autocompletion templates in any language.

name: Material Theme UI
description: Applies Google Material Design inspired color schemes, icon sets, and UI elements to the IDE.

name: Atom Material Icons
description: Replaces default file and folder icons with a modern Atom-style Material icon pack.

name: Extra Icons
description: Adds 500+ additional file type icons for tools like Travis CI, GitLab, Angular, and more.

name: Nyan Progress Bar
description: Replaces standard IDE progress bars with an animated Nyan Cat graphic.

name: Kursor
description: Changes cursor visuals dynamically based on the current editing context and programming language.

name: Better Highlights
description: Colorizes comments, keywords, and method calls, and displays cognitive complexity metrics in the editor.

name: GitToolBox
description: Enhances built-in Git with inline blame, auto-fetch, branch status indicators, and commit autocompletion.

name: .ignore
description: Syntax highlighting, inspection, and rule management for .gitignore, .dockerignore, and other ignore files.

name: GitLive
description: Real-time merge conflict detection, team online presence, and gutter diff indicators for collaborative Git workflows.

name: Conventional Commit
description: Provides autocompletion for the Conventional Commits semantic commit message format in the VCS dialog.

name: Git Machete
description: Branch organizer with visual topology and automation for rebase and merge-based Git workflows.

name: GitLink
description: Generates shareable GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket links to selected code lines from within the IDE.

name: Find Pull Request
description: Opens the pull request associated with code changes via a right-click context menu action.

name: Commit Message Template
description: Lets you define and apply custom commit message templates to enforce team conventions.

name: .gitattributes Support
description: Adds syntax highlighting and autocomplete for .gitattributes files.

name: SonarQube for IDE
description: Formerly SonarLint; provides real-time static code analysis and security vulnerability detection in the editor.

name: CheckStyle-IDEA
description: Integrates Checkstyle for real-time Java code style checking and automatic violation fixes.

name: Pylint
description: Integrates Pylint static analysis for real-time and on-demand scanning of Python files.

name: Php Inspections (EA Extended)
description: Adds extended static analysis inspections for PHP code quality and best practices.

name: detekt
description: Integrates detekt static code analysis for Kotlin to catch code smells and style violations.

name: MetricsTree
description: Displays code quality metrics (LOC, QMOOD, Robert Martin metrics) as a tree view in the IDE.

name: Docker
description: Official JetBrains plugin for managing Docker images, containers, Compose files, and debugging in containers.

name: Kubernetes
description: Advanced editor and runtime support for Kubernetes YAML/Helm files with cluster connection and pod management.

name: Kubernetes by Red Hat
description: Red Hat's plugin for interacting with Kubernetes and OpenShift clusters directly from the IDE.

name: Kubernetes Control Center
description: Alternative Kubernetes management plugin with a control panel UI for cluster resource operations.

name: AWS Toolkit
description: AWS resource explorer, Lambda run/debug, CloudWatch logs, and S3 browser integrated into the IDE.

name: Azure Toolkit for IntelliJ
description: Microsoft's plugin for managing Azure resources, running Azure Functions, and deploying apps from IntelliJ.

name: Azure Toolkit for Rider
description: Azure resource explorer and Azure Functions run/debug support for the Rider IDE.

name: Google Cloud Code
description: Integrates Google Cloud Platform services, Cloud Run, and GKE management into JetBrains IDEs.

name: Terraform and HCL
description: IDE-level support for HCL, Terraform, OpenTofu, and Terragrunt including completion and validation.

name: Jenkins Control
description: Trigger Jenkins jobs and view build logs directly from within the IDE.

name: Alibaba Cloud Toolkit
description: Alibaba Cloud service management and deployment tools integrated into JetBrains IDEs.

name: GitHub Actions Manager
description: View GitHub Actions workflow runs, job statuses, and logs without leaving the IDE.

name: GitLab CICD - Pipelines & Jobs
description: View GitLab CI/CD pipeline state and trigger jobs directly from the IDE.

name: CI Aid for GitLab
description: GitLab CI YAML editing with real-time validation, autocompletion, and syntax support.

name: BashSupport Pro
description: Full IDE support for shell scripting including Bash, POSIX sh, and Zsh with completion and debugging.

name: PowerShell
description: Full IDE capabilities for PowerShell scripting including completion, debugging, and syntax highlighting.

name: Scala
description: Complete Scala language support (Scala 2 and 3) with completion, refactoring, and debugging at the Java level.

name: Lombok
description: Adds IDE support for Lombok annotations so generated code (getters, builders, etc.) is recognized correctly.

name: Rust
description: Rust language support for JetBrains IDEs with completion, navigation, and refactoring (bundled in RustRover).

name: Python
description: Full Python language support plugin for non-PyCharm JetBrains IDEs including completion and debugging.

name: GraphQL
description: Schema-aware GraphQL completion, error highlighting, and brace matching with over a million downloads.

name: CSV Editor
description: Edit CSV and TSV files in a colored table view or structured text mode with syntax highlighting.

name: PlantUML Integration
description: Create UML and architecture diagrams from plain PlantUML text directly within the IDE.

name: PDF Viewer
description: View PDF files directly inside the JetBrains IDE without switching to an external application.

name: .env files support
description: Syntax highlighting, autocompletion, and inspections for .env environment variable files.

name: EnvFile
description: Sets environment variables from .env, YAML, or JSON files when running run configurations.

name: Randomness
description: Generates random data (numbers, UUIDs, emails, names, etc.) for insertion into code and tests.

name: Json Helper
description: JSON manipulation tools including path search, escape/unescape, prettify, and minify.

name: Translation
description: Translate selected text using Google Translate, Microsoft Translator, or DeepL from within the IDE.

name: Archive Browser
description: Browse and open files inside ZIP, JAR, TAR, and other archive formats including nested archives.

name: Grep Console
description: Tail, filter, and highlight console/terminal output with regex patterns and color coding.

name: BinEd - Binary/Hex Editor
description: View and edit any file in binary or hexadecimal mode with a full-featured hex editor.

name: Ideolog
description: Interactive log file viewer with syntax highlighting and pattern-based navigation for log analysis.

name: Easy I18n
description: Edit translation files (JSON, YAML, properties) in a side-by-side comparison view for internationalization.

name: Developer Tools
description: Built-in UI tools for JWT decoding, RegExp checking, and text diffing directly inside the IDE.

name: Run Configuration as Action
description: Register run configurations as IDE actions so you can assign custom keyboard shortcuts to them.

name: CPU Usage Indicator
description: Displays real-time system and IDE CPU consumption in the status bar.

name: Code With Me
description: JetBrains native tool for real-time remote collaboration, pair programming, and shared debugging.

name: Frame Switcher
description: Quickly switch between open projects or reopen recently closed ones from a popup switcher.

name: Projects Organizer
description: Transforms the recent projects list into a structured catalog with named groups and tags.

name: Focus on Active Task
description: Filters the project tree to show only files and paths relevant to the current task.

name: Window Arranger
description: Resize and reposition IDE tool windows programmatically, useful for presentations and screen recording.

name: Extra ToolWindow Colorful Icons
description: Makes tool window stripe icons colorful and distinct for easier visual identification.

name: Icon Viewer 2
description: Shows image files as rendered icons directly in the project explorer for quick visual identification.

name: Cron & Crontab Support
description: Highlights crontab syntax errors, translates cron expressions to human language, and enables execution.

name: IdeaVim-Quickscope
description: Highlights unique characters per word for faster Vim f/F/t/T navigation motions.

name: Which-Key
description: Displays popup menus showing available IdeaVim keybindings as you type leader sequences.

name: JPA Buddy
description: Extends database tools for Hibernate, Spring Data, Flyway, and Liquibase with visual editors and generators.

name: Maven Helper
description: Extends Maven support with dependency conflict analysis, exclusion tools, and build actions.

name: Maven Dependency Checker
description: Checks for newer versions of Maven dependencies and highlights outdated ones in pom.xml.

name: Gradle Utilities
description: Lists active Gradle daemons, checks Gradle versions, and provides cache management tools.

name: Spring Boot Helper
description: Autocomplete for Spring Boot configuration files and application properties with paid extended features.

name: JSON To Kotlin Class
description: Converts JSON snippets into Kotlin data classes with configurable output options.

name: ktfmt
description: Alternative Kotlin source code formatter that enforces consistent style via the ktfmt tool.

name: kotlin-fill-class
description: Fills Kotlin constructors and function calls with default values to speed up test writing.

name: RoboPOJOGenerator
description: Generates Java POJO classes from JSON, JSON Schema, and other data formats.

name: JRebel and XRebel
description: Integrates JRebel hot reload and XRebel performance profiler for Java applications.

name: Lightrun
description: Inject logs, snapshots, and metrics into running production or staging apps without redeployment.

name: VisualVM Launcher
description: Launch VisualVM profiler directly from a run configuration in the IDE for Java performance analysis.

name: Byte Code Analyzer
description: Provides views and analysis tools for Java .class bytecode files.

name: Debug Image Viewer
description: Display OpenCV Mat and image objects as rendered images during debugging sessions.

name: adb_idea
description: Adds frequently used ADB commands (clear data, kill app, revoke permissions) to Android Studio and IntelliJ.

name: Compose Color Preview
description: Draws Android Compose color values as inline color swatches in the gutter for visual reference.

name: Python Annotations
description: Inspections and quick-fixes for Python type annotations, helping modernize code to current PEP standards.

name: Django command runner
description: Run Django management commands directly from the command definition with a single click.

name: Pydantic
description: Autocompletion, navigation, and refactoring support for Pydantic models in Python projects.

name: Odoo
description: Odoo framework support with autocompletion, navigation, and framework-aware inspections.

name: Big Data Tools
description: Seamless integration with Apache Spark and Hadoop for development, debugging, and monitoring.

name: OpenCV Image Viewer
description: Enables image manipulation and real-time display of OpenCV results during debugging.

name: Lets-Plot in SciView
description: Interactive data visualizations (scatter plots, bar charts, heatmaps) powered by Lets-Plot in the IDE.

name: Quokka
description: JavaScript and TypeScript live playground that runs code inline as you type and shows results.

name: Wallaby
description: Intelligent continuous test runner with inline coverage reporting and instant test feedback.

name: NPM Update Dependencies
description: Highlights outdated npm packages and allows single-click updates to the latest versions.

name: LogIt
description: Insert console.log statements for selected variables with a keyboard shortcut.

name: IntelliVue
description: Analysis and code utilities for Vue.js Single File Components including navigation and refactoring.

name: React Buddy

name: React Native Console

name: Run configuration for TypeScript

name: PHP Toolbox
description: Improves PHP autocompletion for popular frameworks and libraries with metadata extensions.

name: PHP Annotations
description: Supports PHP Doctrine annotations and PHP 8 Attributes with completion and navigation.

name: deep-assoc-completion
description: Auto-completion for associative PHP array keys inferred from code flow.

name: Whisperer For Laravel

name: Symfony Plugin

name: Yii2 Framework Support

name: Magento and Adobe Commerce PhpStorm by Atwix

name: Structured Logging

name: MoqComplete

name: Heap Allocations Viewer

name: CMake Plus

name: RustJson

name: Jira Integration

name: Azd

name: Json Parser & Code Gen

name: Native Terminal
